details: TANH not in get_op_init_and_func_default switch in this worktree version. Need to find how TANH dispatch works - checking unary_program_factory and compute kernel.
SOFTSHRINK is parametrized type per is_parametrized_type() but not in get_op_init_and_func_parameterized switch. Searching broadly.
RSUB is a UNARY_OP_SCALAR_VARIANT, dispatched via EltwiseUnaryWithParam with a scalar param. Not found in get_op_init_and_func in unary_op_utils.cpp. Investigating alternate dispatch paths.

No ckernel_sfpu_tanh.h found. TANH is not implemented as a dedicated SFPU kernel in this codebase. It uses the SFPLOADMACRO (replay buffer) approach via the math pipeline. Looking at how tanh_tile dispatches.

SOFTSHRINK has no SFPU kernel implementation. is_parametrized_type() returns true, but get_op_init_and_func_parameterized has no SOFTSHRINK case (default: TT_THROW). No softshrink_tile/soft_shrink in LLK or compute_kernel_api layers. The operation type exists in the enum and Python API but has no working SFPU dispatch.

RSUB unary op type exists in enum but is NOT implemented in unary_op_utils get_op_init_and_func - would TT_FATAL at runtime. RSUB is functional as BinaryOpType with SfpuBinaryOp::RSUB in binary_ng path. Switching to analyze binary SFPU path.

SOFTSHRINK SFPU kernel has been nuked from this branch. No ckernel_sfpu_softshrink.h, no llk_sfpu_softshrink.h, no softshrink_tile API function. The dispatch chain is broken: is_parametrized_type returns true but get_op_init_and_func_parameterized has no SOFTSHRINK case. This is intentional - the branch is for regenerating SFPU kernels.

TANH has NO dedicated ckernel_sfpu_tanh.h or llk_math_eltwise_unary_sfpu_tanh.h. The SFPU implementation files were removed in this worktree (generator eval). The compute_kernel_api.h references llk_math_eltwise_unary_sfpu_tanh which is undefined. This is a MISSING implementation. Will analyze what would have been there by examining sibling operations and the tanh mathematical structure.

tile_func: NOT_WIRED - would be hardtanh_tile(idst, param0, param1)
notes: HARDTANH has ckernel_sfpu_hardtanh.h but no API header, no LLK dispatch, and no case in get_op_init_and_func. Operation is declared in UnaryOpType enum but SFPU dispatch is not yet wired.

key_findings: Both WH and BH implementations are identical. Uses SFPI abstractions (vFloat, dst_reg, v_if/v_endif). Takes 3 uint32_t params encoded in FP16_B: p0=-(neg_threshold), p1=-(pos_threshold-neg_threshold), p2=-(pos_threshold). Implements hardtanh via additive clamping: add offset, clamp to zero if out of range, add reverse offset.

critical_finding: SFPU kernel implementation has been NUKED from this branch. dispatch chain is broken at get_op_init_and_func_parameterized (no SOFTSHRINK case). No ckernel_sfpu_softshrink.h exists. No compute API header, no LLK dispatch function. All layers deleted per DEEP_NUKE_MANIFEST Phase 1.

details: RSUB exists as UnaryOpType::RSUB in the unary enum but is NOT implemented in the unary SFPU dispatch chain (would TT_FATAL at get_op_init_and_func_parameterized). Actual functional SFPU implementation is via BinaryOpType::RSUB in the binary_ng pipeline, using SfpuBinaryOp::RSUB -> rsub_binary_tile -> llk_math_eltwise_binary_sfpu_binop<APPROX, BinaryOp::RSUB>

files_read: NONE - all SFPU kernel files for softshrink have been deleted
key_findings: softshrink SFPU kernel was deleted in DEEP_NUKE Phase 1. No ckernel_sfpu_softshrink.h in tt_llk (WH or BH). No llk_math_eltwise_unary_sfpu_softshrink.h. No compute API softshrink.h. Only the UnaryOpType enum value, REGISTER_UNARY_OPERATION_WITH_FLOAT_PARAMETER macro, is_parametrized_type() case, and Python bindings survive.
RSUB branch: result = in1 - in0. Uses SFPI abstractions (vFloat, dst_reg). WH and BH implementations are identical. No CC manipulation needed.

note: No SFPU instructions to analyze - kernel has been nuked. Analysis documents the nuked state and what the expected implementation would require based on analogous ops (hardtanh) and the softshrink mathematical definition.

addr_mod: ADDR_MOD_7 (all zero increments, both WH and BH)

Analysis based on: (1) API header signatures, (2) sibling hyperbolic ops (sinh, atanh), (3) exp_21f helper shared by sinh, (4) hardware model reference.

key_findings: tanh SFPU implementation files stripped from worktree. API header defines tanh_tile<fast_and_approx=false> calling llk_math_eltwise_unary_sfpu_tanh<false, DST_ACCUM_MODE>. LLK function body missing. Sibling sinh uses exp_21f(z)=(2^z via Moroz et al.) for exp approximation. tanh(x)=(exp(2x)-1)/(exp(2x)+1) would follow same exp_21f pattern.

llk_math_eltwise_unary_sfpu_power.h DOES NOT EXIST. ckernel_sfpu_power.h DOES NOT EXIST. No power.h in new split API. POWER not in unary_op_utils switch cases. The entire device-side SFPU kernel chain for power is absent.
